tenders.detailedDescription: 1.1. tenders.detailedDescription: Ravensbourne University London is pleased to invite your organisation to submit a tender for the initial advance works package associated with the Ravensbourne University London - BMS Upgrade Project. The project comprises a phased upgrade of the University's existing Trend Building Management System estate, including the replacement of legacy Trend IQ Series controllers and the migration from the existing Trend 963 supervisor to the IQ Vision platform. As an initial phase of the project, Ravensbourne University is seeking competitive tenders for the replacement of the Level 2 Fan Coil Unit Controllers only. The University intends to undertake these works during August 2026 and is seeking confirmation of your ability to resource and deliver the works within the available programme period. Tenderers are requested to submit a fixed price for the Level 2 Fan Coil Unit Controller replacement works only, as detailed within the tender documentation provided.

tenders.title: Contract Award Notice - Landfill Gas to Electricity, Cost Commission
tenders.summary: This project will commission independent, quality-assured evidence on the costs, operational characteristics and revenues of landfill-gas-to-electricity generation in Great Britain. It will focus on c
tenders.detailedDescription: This project will commission independent, quality-assured evidence on the costs, operational characteristics and revenues of landfill-gas-to-electricity generation in Great Britain. It will focus on continued electricity generation and directly attributable supporting systems, using a structured operator survey, targeted follow-up engagement and third-party triangulation to compile an anonymised dataset covering historical actuals and forward projections. The work will capture key cost and operational drivers, including gas decline, load factors, gas quality, reinvestment needs and commercial arrangements. Outputs will include an Excel-based data workbook, validation log, technical report, and a presentation setting out the methodology, key findings, uncertainties and benchmarked cost evidence.
